full_text:
Jin Zong 晉宗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Zong (晉宗). Rebelled in favor of Cao Pi, raided Anle, but after six months, he was defeated and captured. Jin Zong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
